creator: ddavid@ican.net
text:
The "www/data/index.html" when built on my home machine is missing links
 to the following index.html files,
"NEWS" -> more link
Releases link
Ports link
Tutorials link
Security link
Projexts link
"THIS SITE"
more link

Fix: 

edit "www/data/index.html" file and place "index.html" in the above links.
How-To-Repeat: install www/doc from cvs
